findings: CI does not exercise stop/teardown; it runs syntax, ShellCheck, frontmatter check, install smoke test (demo skipped), and stampede.sh --help only.
Teardown exists only behind --teardown; launcher has no ERR/INT/EXIT trap to auto-teardown on failure/interrupt.
Teardown removes pidfiles and ends tmux session but does not remove run dir contents (queue/claimed/results/logs/scripts remain).
Launcher writes temporary attach/task files under /tmp without cleanup after use (may violate some environments’ policies).
